payload.label: dresser
payload.long_description: Dark brown stained wooden dresser with six drawers, decorative raised drawer fronts and dark metal handles; front is mostly visible but slightly cropped at the top-left edge, with a polished finish and minor surface wear, approximately 1.0 m from the camera.
